title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Brûlée, Jinbe, Capone Bege, Big Mom Pirates, Big Mom, Luffy as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaaah I don't want my face to be exposed, I'll be killed if I'm seen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up! You're exposed already, they already know it's you from your powers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the key to the "allied forces" escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I complete this mission, my heart will be returned to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And once that's done, I'll show them all !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I still haven't heard the strange shriek they mentioned in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The swarm of straw hats are rampaging ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they did break mother Carmel's photo !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom is confused as to what to be angry about.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So let's show her the broken photo one more time !

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why are you getting in our way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: brother Peros!! Hurry up and kill them already !!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good grief, the future-seeing man sure is busy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in this place, even I can see the future!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will die here, unable to move in my candy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If only we had our raid suits!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This wouldn't have gone your way !

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RAID. WHAT? Are those your weapons?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Perorn : Why would you try to bring that ...

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
